scripts.test:home-quick-start: rm -rf .tmp-tests/home-quick-start && ./node_modules/.bin/tsc --target es2017 --lib dom,dom.iterable,esnext --skipLibCheck --module commonjs --moduleResolution node --jsx react-jsx --esModuleInterop --outDir .tmp-tests/home-quick-start tests/home-quick-start-regression.tsx && node .tmp-tests/home-quick-start/tests/home-quick-start-regression.js
